query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN st.type = 'residentes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as residentes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN st.type = 'visitantes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as visitantes
FROM survey_responses sr
LEFT JOIN survey_templates st ON sr.templateId = st.id
WHERE sr.status = 'completa';
